name: Banana-Chocolate Chip Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup mashed very ripe bananas (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order suggested by your manufacturer's instructions for the bread machine pan.
- Add mashed bananas and milk first.
- Then add the egg, butter or margarine, salt, flour, and semisweet chocolate pieces.
2. If your machine pan holds 10 cups of water or less, use a 1-pound recipe.
3. Follow the recommended cycle settings for your bread machine:
- Basic/white bread cycle
- Light or medium/normal color setting
Note: The final texture and appearance of the bread will vary depending on your specific bread-making machine. Some machines may produce smooth chocolate-colored bread, while others may leave bits of chocolate chips or create a marbled loaf.
